skills.name: skill-creator
skills.title: Skill Creator
skills.description: USE FOR: authoring a new skill package (manifest.json + SKILL.md + scripts/references/assets); updating an existing skill's frontmatter, workflow, or references; validating a skill against catalog/skills.schema.json before it's added to catalog/skills.json; deciding whether new capability belongs in .agents/skills/ (a skill) vs .pmcro/ (runtime policy/state) vs .pmcro/agents/ (one of the five fixed PMCR-O roles). DO NOT USE FOR: implementing the actual PMCR-O runtime (Orchestrator/Planner/Maker/Checker/Reflector) — those are compiled C# services, never skill packages. DO NOT USE FOR: executing a skill's own scripts. INVOKES: interview the requester on skill scope, draft SKILL.md + manifest.json from templates in assets/, validate against schema, update catalog/skills.json, report status.
skills.compatibility: Targets Microsoft Agent Framework's AgentSkillsProvider (file-based skills). Requires Python 3.12+ and jsonschema to run validation scripts locally.

skills.name: git
skills.title: Git (Local)
skills.description: USE FOR: local version-control operations on a repository already present on disk — init, status, add/stage, commit, branch create/switch/list, diff, log. DO NOT USE FOR: any remote operation (push, pull, fetch, clone, remote add) or GitHub-specific actions (PRs, issues, releases) — explicitly out of scope for this skill. DO NOT USE FOR: resolving merge conflicts automatically or force-rewriting history (rebase -i, reset --hard, push --force) without explicit human confirmation per commit. INVOKES: run scripts/git_local.py against the target repo path with a whitelisted subcommand, report the resulting state (staged files, commit hash, branch, diff summary) back to the requester.
skills.compatibility: Requires git installed and on PATH. Python 3.12+ to run scripts/git_local.py. Operates only on repositories already initialized or explicitly requested to be initialized on the local filesystem.

skills.name: plugin-packager
skills.title: Plugin Packager
skills.description: USE FOR: converting an existing PMCR-O catalog skill (manifest.json + SKILL.md, dotnet-agent-skills convention) into a Cowork/Claude Code-compatible .plugin package (.claude-plugin/plugin.json + skills/<skill>/SKILL.md); answering whether a given catalog skill is plugin-compatible. DO NOT USE FOR: authoring a brand-new skill from scratch. DO NOT USE FOR: packaging the PMCR-O orchestrator/loop itself, which is a hosted C# runtime and cannot be exported as a plugin. INVOKES: read source manifest.json + SKILL.md, map fields into plugin.json, reconcile frontmatter, copy scripts/references/assets unchanged, zip as .plugin, present to requester.
skills.compatibility: Requires Python 3.12+ and the zip utility. Reads from an existing catalog/<lane>/<package>/skills/<skill>/ directory -- does not create skill content, only repackages it.

skills.name: catalog-check
skills.title: Catalog Check
skills.description: USE FOR: validating that catalog/skills.json is internally consistent (schema-valid, every path exists, every skill has manifest.json + SKILL.md, frontmatter matches the index, no duplicate names); validating that sealed trails under .pmcro/trails/ are well-formed and that their plan frames comply with PLAN-002 (every step names a real catalog skill or is explicitly flagged needs_new_skill). DO NOT USE FOR: authoring or editing skill content itself -- that's skill-creator's job, this only checks what already exists. DO NOT USE FOR: deciding whether a LOOP-worthy finding should become an EarnedConstraint -- this skill reports findings, Reflector (if invoked) decides what binds. INVOKES: run the repo-root scripts/validate_catalog.py for catalog-index consistency, run this skill's own scripts/validate_trails.py for trail integrity, report both results together as one pass/fail summary.
skills.compatibility: Requires Python 3.12+ and jsonschema (shared with the repo-root scripts/validate_catalog.py, which this skill invokes rather than duplicates). Operates read-only -- never modifies catalog/skills.json, trail files, or any skill content.

skills.name: pmcro-loop
skills.title: PMCR-O Loop
skills.description: USE FOR: giving a role (Planner/Maker/Checker/Reflector) the exact file format and trail location to write once the Orchestrator has dispatched to it; starting or resuming a sealed Trail across a session boundary. DO NOT USE FOR: deciding whether to start a cycle, which Trail applies, or dispatch order -- that's the Orchestrator's own O-Mode reasoning. DO NOT USE FOR: the compiled ProjectName runtime, which is a real C# OrchestratorService via MAF, not a Claude session following markdown. INVOKES: read agents/{role}/AGENT.md at the repo root for the dispatched role, perform that role's work, write the corresponding frame file from assets/ templates per references/trail-schema.md, seal disposition.json on PASS.
skills.compatibility: No runtime dependency. Persona content is read from this repo's root agents/{role}/AGENT.md files, not duplicated in this skill. The acting agent writes trail files directly via its own filesystem tools.
